src: Anyway, I navigated this tricky interval, and even the sea co-operated for once, coming in just after the explosion and sweeping away any tell-tale tracks I might have left an hour or more before Diggs arrived from the village to inspect the scene.
mt: De todos modos, pude navegar en este complicado intervalo, y hasta el mar cooperó por una vez, llegando justo después de la explosión y barriendo cualquier rastro revelador que pudiera haber dejado una hora o más antes de que Diggs llegara desde el pueblo para inspeccionar la escena.

src: I think talking to them helped me a lot to recover from those first few months.
mt: Penso che parlare con loro mi abbia aiutato molto a riprendermi da quei primi mesi.

src: I don't know how long I'll be — you'd much better head home.
mt: No sé cuánto tiempo voy a estar, es mejor que te vayas a casa.

src: As a result, people in these institutions quickly came to assume the roles and goals which these institutions required for their survival.
mt: Di conseguenza, le persone in queste istituzioni hanno rapidamente assunto i ruoli e gli obiettivi che queste istituzioni richiedevano per la loro sopravvivenza.

src: Noreen was kept on after the try-out week, but she knew that was only on the strength of Fred, the Stage Manager's sympathetic report, and for the fact that she had a good rapport with everyone in the company, especially Bernie.
mt: Noreen siguió trabajando después de la semana de prueba, pero sabía que era solo gracias a Fred, el informe simpático del director de escena, y al hecho de que tenía una buena relación con todos los de la compañía, especialmente con Bernie.

src: A defendant whose doctor alleges that the plaintiff is malingering must be prepared to call that doctor at trial to substantiate the allegation and to face cross-examination.
mt: Un convenuto il cui medico sostiene che il querelante stia fingendo deve essere pronto a chiamare quel medico al processo per dimostrare l'affermazione e per affrontare l'interrogatorio.

src: ‘It would be marvellous if The Committee were to win the National,’ Scott said, ‘for the two owners have been immensely patient and have let me train the horse after he had been off the course for two and a half years.’
mt: “Sería maravilloso si The Committee ganara el National”, dijo Scott, “porque los dos dueños han sido inmensamente pacientes y me han dejado entrenar al caballo después de que hubiera estado fuera del campo durante dos años y medio”.

src: Kiss is about as valid as a football game; it's a release, a chance for people to forget about their problems for a couple of hours, gather in some celebration and loose off some pent-up energy.
mt: Kiss es tan válido como un partido de fútbol americano; es una liberación, una oportunidad para que la gente olvide sus problemas por un par de horas, se reúna en una celebración y libere un poco de energía reprimida.

src: The owner, a bachelor in his fifties, slept on a camp-bed in the vestibule of the hostel and cooked on a two ring stove in the courtyard, mostly a kind of vegetable stew as far as I could tell.
mt: El dueño, un soltero de unos cincuenta años, dormía en una cama plegable en el vestíbulo del albergue y cocinaba en una estufa de dos fuegos en el patio, sobre todo un tipo de guiso de verduras, por lo que pude ver.

src: And I think it would actually need, if it's going to be adopted as a responsibility, somebody appointed to look at this, or it be put in somebody's job brief and I would have thought ideally that it would be placed with the community worker, and I don't know quite how we're placed for community workers in East Oxford, but maybe it's something we could put to that department.
mt: Y creo que, de hecho, si se va a adoptar como responsabilidad, se necesitaría que alguien lo supervisara o que se incluyera en el trabajo de alguien, y creo que, idealmente, debería asignárselo a un trabajador comunitario, y no sé muy bien cómo estamos situados con los trabajadores comunitarios en East Oxford, pero tal vez sea algo que podamos proponer a ese departamento.

src: Something at the core of him surrendered to her.
mt: Algo en su esencia se le entregó a ella.

src: When they emerged from the vehicle, they saw a Vauxhall Astra, its front badly damaged, directly behind in the inside lane.
mt: Cuando salieron del vehículo, vieron un Vauxhall Astra, con el frontal muy dañado, justo detrás en el carril interior.

src: They're not really severe at all, I mean, they're very much intended for, you know, the weekend type of people, you know, somebody that just wants to spend time outdoors on a Sunday afternoon with the children.
mt: No son realmente severos en absoluto, quiero decir, están pensados para, ya sabes, el tipo de personas de fin de semana, ya sabes, alguien que solo quiere pasar tiempo al aire libre un domingo por la tarde con los niños.

src: ‘And he'd be less under your feet, dear, when you wanted to work at home,’ said Doris with a twinkle in her eye.
mt: “Y estaría menos bajo tus pies, querida, cuando quieras trabajar en casa”, dijo Doris con un brillo en sus ojos.

src: I only hope that the police committee will actually support those and make progress towards introducing them, because that is a way of using some of the people in our village communities to erm, to keep an eye on the community and see that those people that shouldn't go round.
mt: Solo espero que el comité de policía realmente apoye esto y avance en su introducción, porque es una forma de utilizar a algunas personas de nuestras comunidades rurales para, eh, vigilar a la comunidad y asegurarse de que las personas que no deberían ir de un lado a otro no lo hagan.

src: Her fingers barely touched Sabine's in greeting, but one swift head-to-toe appraisal absorbed everything she was wearing, and dismissed it.
mt: Sus dedos apenas tocaron los de Sabine al saludarla, pero una rápida evaluación de la cabeza a los pies absorbió todo lo que llevaba puesto y lo descartó.

src: The very next day, Sunday, I would have to attend the same chapel in its religious function, and the fact that the previous evening it had been a battleground for people who were supposed to be friends and allies, while the ‘enemy’ proceeded with his task uninterrupted outside, led to a more or less permanent confusion in my mind, which I now believe to be totally justified, between violence and religion, and between fact and fancy [or film].
mt: Il giorno dopo, domenica, dovevo presenziare alla stessa cappella per la funzione religiosa, e il fatto che la sera prima fosse stata un campo di battaglia per persone che si supponevano essere amici e alleati, mentre il “nemico” procedeva con il suo compito indistaccato all’esterno, ha portato a una confusione più o meno permanente nella mia mente, che ora credo essere totalmente giustificata, tra violenza e religione, e tra realtà e finzione [o film].

src: Courageous in tackling the over-spending bogey that did such havoc in 1987, it nevertheless opened the floodgates to a fortnight of ‘we can give away more tax than you’, and exchanges between the two parties of a staggering triviality that effectively supplanted any wider debate about the economy.
mt: Aunque tuvo la valentía de abordar el problema del exceso de gastos que causó tanto daño en 1987, abrió las compuertas a una semana y media de “podemos regalar más impuestos que tú”, y a intercambios entre los dos partidos de una trivialidad asombrosa que suplantó de forma efectiva cualquier debate más amplio sobre la economía.

src: Manager Tommy Gilmour will fly to Puerto Rico in three weeks to try and bring the Camacho fight to Glasgow in January, giving Weir almost three months to recover from his first ever cut in one hundred and sixty seven fights as both amateur and professional.
mt: El entrenador Tommy Gilmour viajará a Puerto Rico en tres semanas para intentar llevar la pelea de Camacho a Glasgow en enero, lo que le dará a Weir casi tres meses para recuperarse de su primera herida en ciento sesenta y siete peleas como aficionado y profesional.

src: ‘How are you and Niall doing together, by the way?’
mt: ‘¿Cómo están tú y Niall juntos, por cierto?’

src: Just see how things go.
mt: Basta vedere come vanno le cose.

src: ‘That's all you'll receive from me, and don't forget I want my suit from the pawnshop when I come back to fetch my other things.’
mt: “Eso es todo lo que recibirás de mí, y no olvides que quiero mi traje de la casa de empeño cuando regrese a buscar mis otras cosas”.

src: Iliescu said that the NSF leadership had been criticized for capitulating to mob rule, and that the issue, like that of the death penalty, should instead be put to a referendum.
mt: Iliescu dijo que la dirección del NSF había sido criticada por capitular ante la presión de la multitud y que el tema, como el de la pena de muerte, debería someterse a un referéndum.

src: The board yesterday decided to close 11 of its 77 community clinics after it was told that studies had shown that doctors' practices were assuming responsibility for child health surveillance.
mt: Ieri il consiglio ha deciso di chiudere 11 dei suoi 77 ambulatori comunitari dopo che gli è stato comunicato che gli studi hanno dimostrato che gli studi dei medici stavano assumendo la responsabilità della sorveglianza della salute dei bambini.

src: Dr Barnardo's was another charity she supported at about the same time; this charity has left its old orphanage image behind, and the Princess feels her connections with it have been fruitful.
mt: La Dra. Barnardo fue otra de las organizaciones benéficas que apoyó casi al mismo tiempo; esta organización benéfica ha dejado atrás su antigua imagen de orfanato, y la princesa siente que sus conexiones con ella han sido fructíferas.

src: They scolded Timmy just as things were beginning to move.
mt: Reprearon a Timmy justo cuando las cosas empezaban a moverse.

src: The Stoke Row Garage is having to hire extra staff to deal with servicing demand.
mt: El garaje de Stoke Row se ve obligado a contratar personal adicional para hacer frente a la demanda de servicios.

src: Seven years ago, needing more space for their family (two daughters, currently both art students) and their work, they decided to move, and to undertake the restoration of a rather dilapidated but unrestored farmhouse.
mt: Sette anni fa, avendo bisogno di più spazio per la famiglia (due figlie, attualmente entrambe studentesse d'arte) e per il lavoro, decisero di trasferirsi e di intraprendere il restauro di una casa colonica piuttosto fatiscente ma non restaurata.

src: Who was I to challenge a contender like Thomas Carter, a management consultant and the owner-occupier of a £500,000 property set in the accessible Arcadia of Boars Hill?
mt: ¿Quién era yo para desafiar a un contendiente como Thomas Carter, un consultor de gestión y el propietario de una propiedad de 500.000 £ en el accesible Arcadia de Boars Hill?

src: Call me when you finish; I'll be in my office.
mt: Llámame cuando termines; estaré en mi oficina.

src: One night he came back, ripped the bedclothes off and one of my kids managed to escape somehow and call the police.
mt: Una noche él volvió, arrancó la ropa de cama y uno de mis hijos logró escapar de alguna manera y llamar a la policía.

src: It became important to leave the top quickly.
mt: Se volvió importante dejar la cima rápidamente.

src: In the cave itself, bas-reliefs sculpted close together on a stalagmite cone, hard to distinguish for the most part, except for an obvious and memorable reindeer some three feet long, in the museum, animals graphically carved or engraved on bone, many of them heads of horses, but fish too, and pieces of bone, antler and ivory carved quite elaborately into abstract patterns of diamond shapes, chevrons or spirals.
mt: Nella stessa grotta, i bassorilievi scolpiti uno accanto all'altro su un cono di stalagmite, per la maggior parte difficili da distinguere, tranne per una renna evidente e memorabile di circa un metro di lunghezza, nel museo, animali graficamente scolpiti o incisi sull'osso, molti dei quali teste di cavalli, ma anche pesci, e pezzi di osso, corna e avorio scolpiti in modo elaborato in modelli astratti di forme di diamante, chevron o spirali.

src: Berry, Buck, Miles and Stipe exchanged instruments for parts of ‘Green’, but here the whole writing, rehearsal and recording process sees them embracing new roles within their democracy.
mt: Berry, Buck, Miles y Stipe intercambiaron instrumentos para partes de ‘Green’, pero aquí todo el proceso de composición, ensayo y grabación los ve asumiendo nuevos roles dentro de su democracia.

src: She parked outside the high brick wall rather than driving on to the forecourt, and as if he sensed her reluctance to enter the house again he didn't attempt to invite her inside — but neither did he make any attempt to exit the car, and they sat in silence in the light from an overhead street-lamp.
mt: Ella aparcó fuera de la alta pared de ladrillo en lugar de seguir conduciendo hasta el patio de entrada, y como si él percibiera su reticencia a entrar de nuevo en la casa, no intentó invitarla a entrar, pero tampoco hizo ningún intento de salir del coche, y se quedaron sentados en silencio a la luz de un poste de alumbrado público.

src: It may be useful for family health services authorities within the zone to assume responsibility for arranging early retirement packages, where these could be shown to be in the interests of the service.
mt: Può essere utile che le autorità dei servizi sanitari di zona si assumano la responsabilità di organizzare pacchetti di pensionamento anticipato, laddove ciò possa essere dimostrato nell'interesse del servizio.

src: I think we were all back but we couldn't escape, could we?
mt: Creo que todos estábamos de vuelta, pero no podíamos escapar, ¿verdad?

src: Your plan that hiring Suzi as the dancer would avoid the Gesner problem.
mt: Su plan de contratar a Suzi como bailarina evitaría el problema de Gesner.

src: This motion also creates an opportunity for the union, our union, the members' union, to encourage young members, members and branch activists to fill the role of branch administration officers within the regions we represent here today and gain experience in an area of trade union work that they thought might never have existed.
mt: Esta moción también crea una oportunidad para el sindicato, nuestro sindicato, el sindicato de los miembros, para animar a los miembros jóvenes, miembros y activistas de las secciones a que llenen el papel de administradores de las secciones dentro de las regiones que representamos hoy aquí y a que ganen experiencia en un área del trabajo sindical que pensaban que nunca podría haber existido.

src: The bang came again but softer, and she distinguished the squeak of rusty hinges against the din of the stormy night.
mt: El golpe volvió a producirse, pero con menos fuerza, y ella distinguió el chirrido de las bisagras oxidadas entre el estruendo de la noche tormentosa.

src: We also have a mobile disenchanted society in which people do ride their bikes, move around from bedsitter to bedsitter with growing elements of homelessness and there are serious problems about registration.
mt: Abbiamo anche una società mobile e disillusa in cui le persone vanno in giro in bicicletta, si spostano da un bedsitter a un altro con elementi crescenti di senzatetto e ci sono seri problemi di registrazione.

src: In the meantime one studies them as landscapes, so to speak, simply to heighten one's pleasure in sight-seeing, to gain insight into the superficial appearances, to uncover the layers of the palimpsest and to see, for example, a piece of the tenth century in the way a street makes an abrupt turn or does something else unexpected.
mt: Nel frattempo, li si studia come paesaggi, per così dire, semplicemente per aumentare il proprio piacere di visitare, per acquisire una visione delle apparenze superficiali, per scoprire gli strati del palinsesto e per vedere, ad esempio, un pezzo del decimo secolo nel modo in cui una strada fa una svolta improvvisa o fa qualcos'altro inaspettato.

src: It will look at the part played by pressure groups in the system, and it will examine the argument that has been presented for regarding democracy as significantly undermined by ‘political elites’.
mt: Se analizará el papel que desempeñan los grupos de presión en el sistema y se examinará el argumento que se ha presentado para considerar que la democracia está significativamente socavada por las “élites políticas”.

src: The Parliamentary Labour Party has agreed to enhance the chances of women securing seats on the Shadow Cabinet in the next elections in November.
mt: El Partido Laborista Parlamentario ha acordado aumentar las posibilidades de que las mujeres obtengan escaños en el Gabinete Sombra en las próximas elecciones de noviembre.

src: I think it was simply because she was a little girl and he couldn't relate to her.
mt: Creo que fue simplemente porque ella era una niña pequeña y él no podía relacionarse con ella.

src: Finn must have been lying awake in the darkness, as she was, the wall separating them like Tristan's sword, for she could hear the soft murmur of him and Francie talking together for a little while, but she could not discern one word.
mt: Finn debió haber estado despierto en la oscuridad, como ella, con la pared separándolos como la espada de Tristán, porque podía oír el suave murmullo de él y Francie hablando juntos por un tiempo, pero no podía discernir una sola palabra.

src: Before tackling this particular challenge to our thesis, let us address two other similarities.
mt: Prima di affrontare questa particolare sfida alla nostra tesi, affrontiamo altre due somiglianze.

src: Ashley capitulated.
mt: Ashley capituló.

src: I just want to take a stand and fight for what is rightfully mine.
mt: Solo quiero tomar una posición y luchar por lo que me pertenece por derecho.

src: The responsibility will now be theirs and they'd better get to work and better show things that they've been arguing and get along.
mt: Ahora la responsabilidad será de ellos y es mejor que empiecen a trabajar y que muestren cosas que hayan estado discutiendo y que lleguen a un acuerdo.

src: This is why it's essential that you socialize with people, that you be more active, because if you find that everybody else is getting up the hill faster than you and everybody else is crossing the roads quicker than you and all the rest of it, it should tell you something, now I mean I don't even want to go into competition but I think it is good occasionally to see if you can walk as fast as that eighteen year old in front of you.
mt: Por eso es esencial que socialices con la gente, que seas más activo, porque si ves que todos los demás suben la colina más rápido que tú y todos los demás cruzan las carreteras más rápido que tú y todo lo demás, eso debería decirte algo, ahora no quiero ni siquiera entrar en competencia, pero creo que es bueno de vez en cuando ver si puedes caminar tan rápido como ese chico de dieciocho años que está delante de ti.

src: He shouts to leave his property and his wife screams hysterically.
mt: Él le grita que se vaya de su propiedad y su esposa grita histéricamente.

src: Two thousand more workers are expected to be hired and the local economy should get a £100 million boost once production reaches capacity.
mt: Se espera contratar a dos mil trabajadores más y la economía local debería recibir un impulso de 100 millones de libras una vez que la producción alcance su capacidad.

src: Our staff go off duty at 17:30, and in good weather they'll go outside to play.
mt: Nuestro personal se va a casa a las 17:30 y, si el tiempo es bueno, salen a jugar.

src: Myeloski exited and waved the man away, holding up his warrant-card as he did so.
mt: Myeloski salió y apartó al hombre con un gesto de la mano, mostrando su tarjeta de agente mientras lo hacía.

src: By February/March, we've had time to recover from Christmas.
mt: En febrero/marzo, hemos tenido tiempo de recuperarnos de Navidad.

src: She could not refuse him, accordingly, and did not; but more and more it was almost as if she had yielded to Mr Poole's demands; one man was much like another.
mt: Ella no podía rechazarlo, por lo tanto, y no lo hizo; pero cada vez era más como si hubiera cedido a las exigencias del señor Poole; un hombre era muy parecido a otro.

src: Parking his Mercedes alongside the Jaguar, he emerged.
mt: Aparcó su Mercedes junto al Jaguar y salió.

src: And then they let all their friends board first.
mt: Y luego dejaron que todos sus amigos subieran primero.

src: Well, she said she was gonna call and let you know how she did.
mt: Bueno, dijo que iba a llamarte para contarte cómo le había ido.

src: Elsa and Vernon can proceed with checking the endocrine levels this morning, and that will leave young Isaacs to monitor today's stuff.
mt: Elsa y Vernon pueden seguir con la comprobación de los niveles endocrinos esta mañana, y eso dejará a la joven Isaacs para que supervise las cosas de hoy.

src: You should be leaving here?
mt: ¿Deberías irte de aquí?

src: Finally we decide to rent the movie we ignored a few months ago when we went to see Midnight Run.
mt: Finalmente decidimos rentar la película que ignoramos hace unos meses cuando fuimos a ver Midnight Run.

src: ‘No, well,’ looking at her watch, ‘I must be leaving.’
mt: “No, bueno”, mirando su reloj, “tengo que irme”.

src: ‘I think you're horrid to tell me lies too, and pretend that when you're married you're going to get up to horrible…such disgusting…with that man who looks like a fish with cold yellowish eyes and greeny-yellow skin….’
mt: “Creo que eres horrible por decirme mentiras también, y pretender que cuando te cases te levantarás a las horribles... tan repugnantes... con ese hombre que parece un pez con ojos amarillentos fríos y piel verde amarillenta...”

src: They've made a successful start with a pair of eighteen carat gold and turquoise earrings donated by the Elizabeth Gage company of London.
mt: Han hecho un comienzo exitoso con un par de pendientes de oro de dieciocho quilates y turquesa donados por la empresa Elizabeth Gage de Londres.

src: Yes, er er I mean I agree with you Chairman entirely, I mean the arguments have been made before and I will just say them again, that I think the District Council are quite remiss er in asking for this sum of money, particularly in view of the reason that the, the, the field is there, which is for the recreation of the people who live in the estate, and the back end of Southwell, and it always has been, er and that is a responsibility that has been undertaken by this Parish Council, and if, if, if they feel that they, they wish to persist in asking an unreasonable price, and let's face it, the District Council is in a position to look at this situation and say, the Parish Council is doing an excellent job, we will sell them this land for a figure that they can afford.
mt: Sí, es decir, estoy totalmente de acuerdo con usted, señor presidente, es decir, los argumentos ya se han planteado antes y los volveré a repetir, que creo que el Ayuntamiento Distrital es bastante negligente al pedir esta suma de dinero, en particular, teniendo en cuenta el motivo por el que el campo está allí, que es para la recreación de las personas que viven en la finca y en el extremo sur de Southwell, y siempre lo ha sido, y es una responsabilidad que ha asumido este Ayuntamiento Parroquial, y si, si, si sienten que, que desean insistir en pedir un precio irrazonable, y seamos sinceros, el Ayuntamiento Distrital está en posición de mirar esta situación y decir, el Ayuntamiento Parroquial está haciendo un excelente trabajo, les venderemos esta tierra por una cantidad que puedan pagar.

src: So in effect, if you write this long, long, rambling press release, you won't convey the point you were trying to make, you'll get publicity okay, but you won't achieve the kind of thing you wanted.
mt: Así que, en efecto, si escribes este largo, largo y divagante comunicado de prensa, no transmitirás el punto que estabas tratando de hacer, tendrás publicidad, sí, pero no lograrás el tipo de cosas que querías.

src: With the advent of delegated management responsibility to schools and the use of internal evaluation processes, schools could assume more responsibility for the distribution of resources.
mt: Con l’avvento della gestione delegata alle scuole e l’uso di processi di valutazione interna, le scuole potrebbero assumere maggiore responsabilità per la distribuzione delle risorse.

src: She nearly couldn't resist the temptation to open it straight away, but the kettle was almost boiling and so she pushed the cards and letters to one side while she spooned coffee and sugar into a mug.
mt: Ella casi no pudo resistirse a la tentación de abrirlo inmediatamente, pero la tetera estaba a punto de hervir, así que apartó las cartas y tarjetas mientras echaba café y azúcar en una taza.

src: Eleven tricks resulted in a very good score, as several other declarers had actually contrived to go off in the same contract.
mt: Once bazas resultaron en una puntuación muy buena, ya que varios otros declarantes habían logrado salir en el mismo contrato.

src: As far as Frank is concerned, he is entirely satisfied with what I am doing and he has given me the space to proceed with it.
mt: En lo que a Frank concierne, él está totalmente satisfecho con lo que estoy haciendo y me ha dado el espacio para proceder con ello.

src: Only last week he had told him to leave the bathtub and described him as ‘a little rat’.
mt: Solo la semana pasada le había dicho que saliera de la bañera y lo había descrito como “una pequeña rata”.

src: Both are lonely, so Ernie (the pro) accepts Mike (the amateur) as a partner.
mt: Los dos están solos, así que Ernie (el profesional) acepta a Mike (el aficionado) como compañero.

src: And that she looked shocked, you know, she didn't know me like, and er, well she was shocked, and then I said I said, right, well we'll have to meet and sort something out about stopping with her, and Pete said straight away.
mt: Y que ella parecía estar impactada, ya sabes, no me conocía, y, bueno, estaba impactada, y entonces le dije que teníamos que reunirnos y arreglar algo sobre dejar de ir con ella, y Pete dijo de inmediato.

src: When I emerged into the corridor I saw that a piece of wire had been strung between two beams on either side of the block and that a sort of ladder was leaning against it.
mt: Cuando salí al pasillo, vi que se había tendido un trozo de alambre entre dos vigas a cada lado del bloque y que una especie de escalera estaba apoyada contra él.

src: Because what you notice is there's about sort of nearly reaching half an inch overlap between the louvres.
mt: Porque lo que se nota es que hay una especie de superposición de casi media pulgada entre las persianas.

src: ‘Maybe’, I said, with a completely straight face, ‘he wants to see how the units are progressing.’
mt: “Tal vez”, dije con una cara totalmente seria, “quiere ver cómo están avanzando las unidades”.

src: But there have been people so sunk in self-blame they've assumed the guilt of their firm's collapse — which really does have to be nonsense.
mt: Pero ha habido personas tan sumidas en la autoculpa que han asumido la culpa de la caída de su empresa, lo que realmente no puede ser.

src: When their businesses were booming, they could afford to pose as tough-talking entrepreneurs keen to challenge the telephone companies.
mt: Cuando sus negocios estaban en auge, podían permitirse el lujo de aparentar ser empresarios duros que querían desafiar a las compañías telefónicas.

src: ‘They can't now be heard to say, ‘Boo hoo I want to back out of it now’,’ said Mr Prescott.
mt: “Ahora no pueden decir: ‘Ay, ay, quiero dar marcha atrás’, dijo el Sr. Prescott.

src: My new mother-in-law, Martha, has worked long and hard for many months to prepare this wonderful occasion, all the little details such as these beautiful flower/cake decorations were planned by her, and my father-in-law has acquired a second mortgage without complaint, like the good-natured man he is.
mt: Mi nueva suegra, Martha, ha trabajado mucho y duro durante muchos meses para preparar esta maravillosa ocasión, todos los pequeños detalles como estas hermosas decoraciones de flores/pastel fueron planeados por ella, y mi suegro ha adquirido una segunda hipoteca sin queja, como el hombre bondadoso que es.

src: One of these days you'll move on from Suzanne.
mt: Un día dejarás a Suzanne.

src: Go down there, and turn around so you can cross and get the curve.
mt: Baja allí y da la vuelta para que puedas cruzar y tomar la curva.

src: Neither the possibility of higher mortgage rates nor the prospect of a Labour Budget increasing taxes encouraged anyone to undertake an increased mortgage.
mt: Né la possibilità di tassi di prestito più elevati né la prospettiva di un bilancio laburista che aumenta le tasse ha incoraggiato nessuno a sottoscrivere un prestito più alto.

mt: La “disciplina monetaria” e la “credibilità pubblica”, parole chiave di questo approccio, avrebbero garantito il contesto più favorevole per il settore privato per condurre la propria attività di creazione e allocazione di ricchezza.

src: …a girl called Marion who works with me, and I think we'll be compatible quite well.
mt: …una chica llamada Marion que trabaja conmigo, y creo que seremos muy compatibles.

src: And if we had, we would certainly have cleared the building and left until it dissipated.
mt: Y si lo hubiéramos hecho, seguramente habríamos desalojado el edificio y nos habríamos ido hasta que se disipara.

src: Seasun Tentrek has dropped under-occupancy surcharges on its apartments and tents for any holidays booked for periods starting on or after August 21, which can make a considerable saving.
mt: Seasun Tentrek ha eliminato i supplementi per bassa occupazione sugli appartamenti e le tende per le vacanze prenotate per periodi a partire dal 21 agosto, il che può consentire un notevole risparmio.

src: ‘I'm happy’, ‘I'm settled’, ‘Now I know what it feels like’, ‘I came out on top’.
mt: “Estoy feliz”, “Estoy bien”, “Ahora sé cómo se siente”, “Salí bien”.

src: He'd be twenty-nine when he was released.
mt: Él tendría veintinueve años cuando lo soltaran.

src: He joined a Swift factory that was fielding a five-strong team, and immediately found himself struggling to adjust to the pace.
mt: Se unió a una fábrica de Swift que tenía un equipo de cinco personas y de inmediato tuvo problemas para adaptarse al ritmo.

src: And apparently, Kenneth Clarke, they don't like each other.
mt: Y aparentemente, Kenneth Clarke, no se quieren unos a otros.

src: The first (firm A) is a levered firm and the second (firm B) is an unlevered firm which decides to incur debt by issuing a bond.
mt: La prima (azienda A) è un'azienda con leva e la seconda (azienda B) è un'azienda senza leva che decide di contrarre un debito emettendo un'obbligazione.

src: Tosh also revealed how once when he was selling a magazine for the homeless at Charing Cross station Diana drew up in her car and a man stepped out and gave him £5.
mt: Tosh también reveló cómo una vez que él estaba vendiendo una revista para los “sin techo” en la estación de Charing Cross, Diana se acercó en su coche y un hombre salió y le dio 5 £.

src: The tornado aircraft was developed under a cost-plus contracting environment, and at the time, that was actually the most efficient and probably the only practical way to do it, because the risks inherent in having three partner companies that don't know how the others work, forming a partnership to build a single aircraft, were extremely high.
mt: El avión Tornado se desarrolló en un entorno de contratación de costos más, y en ese momento, esa era en realidad la forma más eficiente y probablemente la única forma práctica de hacerlo, porque los riesgos inherentes a tener tres compañías asociadas que no saben cómo trabajan las otras, formando una asociación para construir un solo avión, eran extremadamente altos.

src: Dave Watson (Everton)?— Doubt He'd leave, Must be aging.
mt: ¿Dave Watson (Everton)?— Dudo que se vaya, debe de estar envejeciendo.

src: ‘I handed in my resignation yesterday,’ she said softly against his lips, and she felt him stiffen.
mt: “Entregue mi renuncia ayer”, dijo suavemente contra sus labios, y sintió que él se puso rígido.

src: I mean we haven't seen an awful lot of Julian Jochim yet but on the two occasions when the ball's been fed into him he's shown a brilliant ability to turn with the ball and pose a threat to the defenders.
mt: Es decir, aún no hemos visto mucho de Julian Jochim, pero en las dos ocasiones en que le han pasado la pelota, ha demostrado una capacidad brillante para girar con la pelota y representar una amenaza para los defensas.

src: Speedie was just trying to continue the game.
mt: Speedie solo intentaba continuar el juego.

src: Lou Macari says…he's very annoyed about what happened at Swindon. The people that ran the club let him down, but it was up to him to focus on his football and he's happy at Stoke having won a cup at Wembley and promotion to the first division.
mt: Lou Macari dice que está muy molesto por lo que pasó en Swindon. Las personas que dirigían el club lo decepcionaron, pero le tocó a él concentrarse en su fútbol y está feliz en Stoke por haber ganado una copa en Wembley y ascendido a la primera división.

src: He was a delicate baby and I was always the sturdy one and I was always expected to yield to him and sort of coddle him and he, he, he was always sort of put first.
mt: Él era un bebé delicado y yo siempre fui el más robusto y siempre se esperaba que le cediera y que lo mimara y él, él, él siempre estaba en primer lugar.

src: Hard on the heels of an Amon Ra disc of music for mandolin comes this much cheaper Tuxedo reissue (1978 recordings) of more modern repertoire for the instrument; they share only two Mozart settings for voice (in this recording that of the estimable Kurt Equiluz) and mandolin, here with the rather shy obbligato lute (as far as my ears can detect).
mt: Después de un disco de Amon Ra con música para mandolina, llega esta re-edición mucho más económica de Tuxedo (grabaciones de 1978) con un repertorio más moderno para el instrumento; comparten solo dos arreglos de Mozart para voz (en esta grabación la del estimable Kurt Equiluz) y mandolina, aquí con un tímido laúd como obligato (hasta donde mis oídos pueden detectar).

src: Get set: Marathon runners will compete against four-legged competition in a long distance run at Llanwyrtyd Wells, Powys.
mt: Prepárense: los corredores de maratón competirán contra la competencia de cuatro patas en una carrera de larga distancia en Llanwyrtyd Wells, Powys.

src: We're releasing new products more rapidly than ever before.
mt: Stiamo rilasciando nuovi prodotti più rapidamente che mai.

src: I could identify the spot where my dad had stood that night.
mt: Podía identificar el lugar donde mi papá había estado esa noche.

src: This, together with an appreciation of the steeper slopes, soil erosion and the local changes in level and aspect, contributes to a finer assessment of the subtler aspects which may have been of great significance to the original selector's choice of site for the particular settlement under study.
mt: Questo, insieme alla valutazione delle pendenze più ripide, dell'erosione del suolo e delle variazioni locali di livello e aspetto, contribuisce a una valutazione più dettagliata degli aspetti più sottili che possono essere stati di grande importanza per la scelta del sito da parte del selezionatore originale per il particolare insediamento in esame.

src: How he and many others ever pass their driving test in Britain is a recurring nightmare.
mt: El hecho de que él y muchos otros hayan aprobado el examen de conducir en Gran Bretaña es una pesadilla recurrente.

src: Madeleine's face assumed a new expression.
mt: El rostro de Madeleine adquirió una nueva expresión.

src: How is Donna doing anyway these days?
mt: ¿Cómo está Donna estos días?

src: That night, she'd said, ‘If you'd come out the Quindale way you'd never've made it across; it's flooded right across the road from Briar Farm to the old water tower, three feet deep, burst water main,’ and Luke had said, ‘Yeah,’and gone out to the kitchen to raid the fridge.
mt: Esa noche, ella había dicho: “Si hubieras salido por el camino de Quindale, nunca lo hubieras logrado; está inundado todo el camino desde Briar Farm hasta la antigua torre de agua, tres pies de profundidad, una tubería de agua rota”, y Luke había dicho: “Sí”, y había ido a la cocina para saquear el refrigerador.

src: I twisted around and almost blinded myself by staring straight into the sun, but then, through the dizzying glare, I discerned the long silhouette of a tall man who seemed, incongruously, to be dressed in a long, transparent dressing gown.
mt: Me di la vuelta y casi me quedé ciego por mirar directamente al sol, pero entonces, a través del deslumbrante resplandor, distinguí la larga silueta de un hombre alto que parecía, incongruentemente, vestido con una larga bata transparente.

src: The consultation period came to an end on 16 September and we then began work assessing the reaction.
mt: Il periodo di consultazione si è concluso il 16 settembre e abbiamo iniziato a valutare le reazioni.

src: Behind the tarpaulin there were tables and chairs for the RCM workers, mostly, as an American journalist noticed, elegantly turned-out young ladies who looked ‘a good deal more like a junior league committee convening to plan a costume ball than officials waiting to sort out a trainload of Jewish refugee children’.
mt: Detrás de la lona había mesas y sillas para los trabajadores del RCM, en su mayoría, como notó un periodista estadounidense, jóvenes damas elegantemente vestidas que parecían “mucho más un comité de la liga juvenil que se reúne para planificar un baile de disfraces que funcionarios que esperan para resolver un cargamento de niños refugiados judíos”.

src: Paned windows, instead of the more usual draughty gaps, provide warmer viewing.
mt: Le finestre con i vetri, invece delle più comuni aperture ventilate, offrono una visione più calda.

src: When MediaStar was formed from the Colman media department at the end of 1989, it was the first of the hybrid media departments to assume independent buying work.
mt: Cuando MediaStar se formó a partir del departamento de medios de Colman a finales de 1989, fue el primero de los departamentos de medios híbridos en asumir un trabajo de compra independiente.

src: Someone who could have some of the soup, too.
mt: Alguien que también pudiera tener un poco de la sopa.

src: Twangtwangtwangtwing, that's what, methodically tuning up their guitars until you want to rush the stage and just bloody well start playing yourself.
mt: Twangtwangtwangtwing, eso es lo que es, afinando metódicamente sus guitarras hasta que quieres correr al escenario y empezar a tocar tú mismo.

src: Isn't exactly what's happening, I mean what, what's happening is that if they increase rents or whatever, the people who can't pay that they assemble and they demonstrate.
mt: No es exactamente lo que está pasando, quiero decir, lo que está pasando es que si aumentan los alquileres o lo que sea, la gente que no puede pagar se reúne y demuestra.

src: which I think there were four competitors, one of whom advanced to the district final and eventually to the national final that John is going to on Saturday.
mt: creo que había cuatro competidores, uno de los cuales avanzó a la final del distrito y finalmente a la final nacional a la que John irá el sábado.

src: This huge, you know, one two five came, ooh we said, don't board that if you want the university.
mt: Este enorme, ya sabes, uno dos cinco llegó, ooh dijimos, no subas a eso si quieres la universidad.

src: Despite the fact that it can seem at times as if half the figures on the red benches are comatose — a chastened Lady (Barbara) Wootton concluded after eight years in the place that at any one time about ten per cent of the participants in a debate were fast asleep — the quality of argument can be incomparably higher than in the House of Commons, and the pool of expertise available from the ennobled professors, judges, generals and bureaucrats ensures more informed contributions.
mt: Nonostante a volte possa sembrare che metà dei personaggi sui banchi rossi siano in stato comatoso - una Lady (Barbara) Wootton umiliata ha concluso dopo otto anni in quel posto che in qualsiasi momento circa il 10% dei partecipanti a un dibattito dormiva profondamente - la qualità degli argomenti può essere incomparabilmente superiore a quella della Camera dei Comuni, e la riserva di competenze disponibili da parte di professori, giudici, generali e burocrati nobilitati garantisce contributi più informati.

src: In the first division, Oxford play against Luton at the Manor.
mt: En la primera división, el Oxford juega contra el Luton en el Manor.

src: I mean we could manage, we managed alright.
mt: Quiero decir que podríamos arreglárnoslas, lo hicimos bien.

src: The last time Gloucester went to Tyneside to play in the cup they faced the old Gosforth team…the score that day…26-15 to the Cherry and whites…that was almost three years ago…
mt: La última vez que Gloucester fue a Tyneside para jugar en la copa se enfrentó al antiguo equipo de Gosforth... el marcador ese día... 26-15 para los Cherry and Whites... eso fue hace casi tres años...

src: So it's just a matter, as soon as we come back, we leave.
mt: Así que es solo cuestión de que, tan pronto como volvamos, nos vayamos.

mt: “Vi el vídeo de la derrota de Rumanía por 1-0 y los rumanos tuvieron oportunidades, así que sabemos que los belgas pueden ser derrotados.

src: But when he came to the streets where we live he said, ‘If people want a cleaner Britain, they can start with their own street and their own neighbourhood’.
mt: Pero cuando llegó a las calles donde vivimos, dijo: “Si la gente quiere una Gran Bretaña más limpia, puede empezar con su propia calle y su propio barrio”.

src: Whether this was due to Wilko's tactics I do not know, but no one ever looked to penetrate their defence…no one was making darting runs across and past.
mt: No sé si esto se debió a las tácticas de Wilko, pero nadie intentó penetrar en su defensa... nadie hizo carreras veloces de un lado a otro.

mt: KKR dijo que si Hillsborough no podía refinanciar la deuda que había contraído cuando lanzó una adquisición apalancada de 2400 millones de dólares en la industria de la construcción, podría tener que declararse en bancarrota según el Capítulo 11.

src: He shot a very cross look at Maggie but yielded almost at once.
mt: Lanzó una mirada muy enfadada a Maggie, pero cedió casi de inmediato.

src: If…one prescient soul at your level, say, early in 1982,…really had thought ministers should be forced to meet on this issue and they kept postponing discussions on the Falklands, could you as Permanent Secretary of Defence have ensured that relevant Cabinet ministers did convene and look at the problem rationally and seriously, in so far as it's possible, in time?
mt: Si... una alma preclara de su nivel, digamos, a principios de 1982... realmente hubiera pensado que los ministros deberían reunirse sobre este tema y siguieran posponiendo las discusiones sobre las Malvinas, ¿podría usted, como Secretario Permanente de Defensa, haber asegurado que los ministros pertinentes del Gabinete se reunieran y observaran el problema de forma racional y seria, en la medida de lo posible, a tiempo?

src: In contrast, two experienced chemists — Fred Field and William Spiller — were hired at Locksfields, and had set about extending the firm's list of dye products.
mt: Al contrario, a Locksfields furono assunti due chimici esperti, Fred Field e William Spiller, che si impegnarono ad ampliare la lista dei prodotti coloranti dell'azienda.

src: Just for a couple of nights in Dieppe: though I sometimes take the car and go to Rouen.
mt: Solo per un paio di notti a Dieppe, anche se a volte prendo la macchina e vado a Rouen.

src: I am confident that these different-looking species of Synodontis will coexist peacefully together, whereas two of the same or similar species may not.
mt: Sono sicuro che queste specie di Synodontis dall'aspetto diverso coesisteranno pacificamente insieme, mentre due specie uguali o simili potrebbero non farlo.

src: She still was wearing the revealing silk blouse she had worn in the show, with stage jewellery sparkling at her throat and breast.
mt: Ella todavía llevaba la blusa de seda reveladora que había usado en la presentación, con joyas de escenario brillando en su garganta y pecho.

src: Whatever their opinion of him he was clearly in touch with other artists, as in April 1808 he complains bitterly of not being able to make progress on his painting because of other artists coming to see his work.
mt: Sea lo que sea que piensen de él, está claro que él estaba en contacto con otros artistas, ya que en abril de 1808 se queja amargamente de no poder avanzar en su pintura debido a que otros artistas venían a ver su trabajo.

src: After the war, ‘unfilled’ vinyl was used because it had much less surface noise, and a few sets of unfilled vinyl 78s were targeted at early hi-fi buffs.
mt: Después de la guerra, se utilizó vinilo “sin relleno” porque tenía mucho menos ruido de superficie y se destinaron unos pocos conjuntos de discos de vinilo sin relleno a los primeros entusiastas del hi-fi.

mt: “Simplemente no somos de la misma opinión”, declaró Robyn de forma neutral.

mt: Las niñas escaparon con vida y no mucho después de la medianoche estaban en sus camas, pequeñas Cenicientas.

src: We believe that this aspect of general SVQs results in a better programme, because it emphasises the vocational relevance of skills like numeracy and information technology.
mt: Crediamo che questo aspetto dei SVQ generali dia vita a un programma migliore, perché sottolinea la rilevanza professionale di competenze come l’alfabetizzazione matematica e l’informatica.

src: It'll do him good to spend some time outside for a while; being cooped up indoors all day makes him fidgety.
mt: Le hará bien pasar un tiempo fuera; estar encerrado en casa todo el día lo hace inquieto.

src: The grandparents assumed responsibility for the house and the children together: ‘my mother went to work all the week, she never done no cooking.’
mt: Los abuelos asumieron la responsabilidad de la casa y los niños juntos: “mi madre iba a trabajar toda la semana, nunca cocinaba”.

src: The aim is to ease the stress of house-buying by giving advice and assuming some of the workload.
mt: L’obiettivo è quello di ridurre lo stress legato all’acquisto di una casa, dando consigli e assumendo parte del carico di lavoro.

src: The control room, although just workable, is very cramped (especially as it has had to assume committee responsibilities).
mt: La sala di controllo, sebbene funzionante, è molto angusta (soprattutto perché ha dovuto assumersi le responsabilità del comitato).

src: The Ruffians' (4th XI) season drew to a close on Saturday when they faced the third team's opposition at Aldershot.
mt: La temporada de los Ruffians (4.ª XI) llegó a su fin el sábado cuando se enfrentaron a la tercera división en Aldershot.

src: In Britain, though, ever since his selection the media had become very excited about Allan Wells, almost willing him to win, to have the come-back that would constitute a fairy-tale ending.
mt: Sin embargo, en Gran Bretaña, desde su selección, los medios de comunicación se habían entusiasmado mucho con Allan Wells, casi como queriendo que ganara, que tuviera el regreso que constituiría un final de cuento de hadas.

src: So, what's what, well, let's proceed to something a bit more, as it were, specific, I mean what sort of things are you behind with and having difficulty with then?
mt: Quindi, che cosa è che cosa, beh, procediamo a qualcosa di un po' più, per così dire, specifico, intendo dire che tipo di cose non hai fatto e con cui hai difficoltà?

src: Erm, if somebody could spend a little bit of time with Ilias because we've got this language problem and I know that he's found this a little bit difficult, I think he would appreciate it tonight, when you meet.
mt: Bueno, si alguien pudiera pasar un poco de tiempo con Ilias porque tenemos este problema de idioma y sé que le ha resultado un poco difícil, creo que lo agradecería esta noche, cuando os encontréis.

src: If the forecasts are believed, they will affect the actions of agents and so fulfill the role of expectations.
mt: Si se creen las previsiones, afectarán a las acciones de los agentes y, por tanto, cumplirán el papel de expectativas.

src: ‘We can't afford a system which would allow estate agents to do valuations without even leaving their cars.’
mt: “No podemos permitirnos un sistema que permita a los agentes inmobiliarios hacer valoraciones sin siquiera salir de sus coches”.

src: ‘Mr Jones, I'm honoured that you should choose me, but I do feel there are others far more suited to assume the responsibility, people who've worked in radio far longer than I have.’
mt: “Señor Jones, me siento honrado de que me haya elegido, pero creo que hay otras personas que están mucho más preparadas para asumir la responsabilidad, personas que han trabajado en radio mucho más tiempo que yo”.

src: Try to round off your answer by demonstrating how the old job has fitted you to assume the responsibilities of the job you are applying for.
mt: Cercate di completare la vostra risposta mostrando come il vostro precedente lavoro vi ha preparato ad assumervi le responsabilità del lavoro per il quale state facendo domanda.

src: But after university, despite our protestations of eternal friendship and vows to see each other, the gaps between our meetings and our phone calls had got longer and longer.
mt: Ma dopo l’università, nonostante le nostre proteste di eterna amicizia e le promesse di vederci, gli intervalli tra i nostri incontri e le nostre telefonate erano diventati sempre più lunghi.

src: ‘We meet out of work sometimes and we go out to eat together every month.’
mt: “A veces nos encontramos fuera del trabajo y salimos a comer juntos todos los meses”.

src: While the following day's mixed owner sale was also successful, it was also business as usual with greedy consignors and less than spectacular goods resulting in the usual ups and downs.
mt: Aunque la venta mixta del día siguiente también fue un éxito, también fue un negocio como siempre, con consignantes codiciosos y productos menos que espectaculares, lo que supuso los habituales altibajos.

src: A Christmas Carol may be an old favourite this time of year — but performed by Herefordshire college students, it's been given a new twist.
mt: A Christmas Carol puede ser un clásico de esta época del año, pero cuando lo interpretan los estudiantes de la universidad de Herefordshire, se le da un nuevo giro.

src: I joined a group of five Frenchmen as they embarked on the sunken road leading to the orchard.
mt: Me uní a un grupo de cinco franceses cuando se embarcaron en el camino hundido que conduce al huerto.

src: On the outskirts of the City internationally famous Nottingham Forest and England's oldest team Notts County play against their opponents at the City Ground and the Meadow Lane Stadium.
mt: En las afueras de la ciudad, el Nottingham Forest, famoso a nivel internacional, y el Notts County, el equipo más antiguo de Inglaterra, juegan contra sus oponentes en el City Ground y el Meadow Lane Stadium.

src: John Powell, at 61, is probably the oldest driver to have undertaken the new Grand Prix Circuit.
mt: John Powell, con sus 61 años, es probablemente el piloto de mayor edad que se ha adentrado en el nuevo Circuito de Gran Premio.

src: Many of the carers complained that they had no social life; for example a 90-year old widow's daughter, who had her mother living with her, said she was hardly ever able to leave her home, and had not had a holiday for eight years.
mt: Muchos de los cuidadores se quejaron de que no tenían vida social; por ejemplo, la hija de una viuda de 90 años, que tenía a su madre viviendo con ella, dijo que apenas podía salir de su casa y que no había tenido vacaciones en ocho años.

src: But with him on our side, because he's so blooming awkward, he's been pressing the play switch, and of course, so the tape's been turning round, haven't bothered to check, so you know, he was sort of saying, "Well, play that tape and I'll write their names down of the people as they speak, just the first names, you know, so there's loads of..."
mt: Pero con él de nuestro lado, porque es tan torpe, ha estado presionando el botón de reproducción y, por supuesto, la cinta ha estado girando, no nos hemos molestado en comprobarlo, así que, ya sabes, él decía algo así: “Bueno, pon la cinta y escribiré los nombres de las personas que hablan, solo los nombres, así que hay un montón de...”

src: Er, mind you, many people relied on the cycle to travel around, you see.
mt: Ehm, per inciso, molte persone si affidavano alla bicicletta per spostarsi, sapete.

src: Now we are aware that we are losing the agency stuff therefore services should improve generally but this is mostly the business travel, you know duty travel, cruise positioning that sort of thing, to the extent that erm and two of the ops people paid a visit to last week for a liaison meeting and one thing that I thought was absolutely remarkable that came out was in respect of complaining that they could never contact anybody in erm in, they couldn't get a reply from the extensions and they couldn't send messages or anything.
mt: Ahora somos conscientes de que estamos perdiendo cosas de la agencia, por lo tanto, los servicios deberían mejorar en general, pero esto es principalmente los viajes de negocios, sabe, los viajes de trabajo, el posicionamiento de cruceros, ese tipo de cosas, hasta el punto de que erm y dos de las personas de operaciones hicieron una visita la semana pasada para una reunión de enlace y una cosa que pensé que era absolutamente notable que salió fue con respecto a las quejas de que nunca podían contactar a nadie en erm, no podían obtener una respuesta de las extensiones y no podían enviar mensajes ni nada.

src: Naturally I talked over every aspect of it with Elizabeth and the family; and in the end I concluded that if- and only if- convincing evidence was brought to me that a substantial majority in both Houses wished me to accept the job I would do so.
mt: Naturalmente, ne ho discusso ogni aspetto con Elizabeth e con la famiglia; e alla fine ho concluso che se - e solo se - mi fossero state presentate prove convincenti che una maggioranza sostanziale in entrambe le Camere desiderava che accettassi il lavoro, l'avrei fatto.

src: In some circumstances, the numeric values we wish to represent and manipulate are limited to non-negative values.
mt: In alcune circostanze, i valori numerici che desideriamo rappresentare e manipolare sono limitati a valori non negativi.

src: How could you, for instance, put the smarmy, tax-dodging, moonlighting, computer whizz-kid in the same bag as the shoeshine boy trying to earn a living on the streets of a Third World city?
mt: ¿Cómo se podría, por ejemplo, poner al chico de las computadoras, engreído y evasor de impuestos, que trabaja a espaldas de su patrón, en el mismo saco que al chico que limpia zapatos que intenta ganarse la vida en las calles de una ciudad del Tercer Mundo?

src: Looking towards the middle of the room he could just catch sight of the hulk of the engine, even more dense than the surrounding dark.
mt: Mirando hacia el centro de la habitación, apenas podía vislumbrar el enorme motor, aún más denso que la oscuridad circundante.

src: But above all he is the man who challenged Chanel, the greatest fashion legend of the twentieth century.
mt: Ma soprattutto è l'uomo che ha sfidato Chanel, la più grande leggenda della moda del ventesimo secolo.

src: Discount stores are often self-service, and most offer a delivery service for larger items, although sometimes a charge is imposed on this.
mt: I negozi di sconto sono spesso self-service e la maggior parte offre un servizio di consegna per gli articoli più grandi, anche se a volte è a pagamento.

src: ‘He was wearing the usual soft pair of boots which he always wore.’
mt: “Él llevaba las botas suaves que siempre usaba”.

src: Here the going gets rough and speculative: some talk of the discouraging load of bureaucracy the researcher has to navigate, and the lack of opportunity for independent initiative.
mt: Qui il discorso si fa duro e speculativo: alcuni parlano del carico scoraggiante di burocrazia che il ricercatore deve affrontare e della mancanza di opportunità per un’iniziativa indipendente.

src: ‘I might have known — I might have known you hadn't recovered from it.
mt: “Debí haberlo sabido, debí haberlo sabido que no te habías recuperado de eso.

src: That is the awful decision which soldiers have had to make on hundreds of occasions.
mt: Es la terrible decisión que los soldados han tenido que tomar en cientos de ocasiones.

mt: Jeff Hammond, di Willis Corroon, ha affermato che il servizio fornirà i mezzi per far fronte a queste potenziali minacce alle imprese, consentendo loro di concentrarsi sul loro compito principale: fornire prodotti di qualità a un mercato dei consumatori sempre più consapevole.

src: Somehow we then started discussing the theme of French poetry, and Eliot expressed surprise at one of Herbert Read's recent pronouncements on Laforgue and another nineteenth-century poet I cannot recall and about whom at the time I knew too little to be able to arrive at an opinion.
mt: In qualche modo abbiamo iniziato a discutere del tema della poesia francese, e Eliot ha espresso sorpresa per una delle recenti dichiarazioni di Herbert Read su Laforgue e su un altro poeta del diciannovesimo secolo che non riesco a ricordare e di cui al tempo ne sapevo troppo poco per poter esprimere un'opinione.

src: The planning of operations by those who are going to carry them out, obviates delay and misunderstandings which happen to be caused by intermediate stages, and contributes to the speed of execution which in any operation of this kind is an incalculable asset.
mt: La pianificazione delle operazioni da parte di coloro che le eseguiranno, evita ritardi e incomprensioni causati da fasi intermedie e contribuisce alla rapidità di esecuzione che in qualsiasi operazione di questo tipo è un vantaggio incalcolabile.

src: We have to disembark after three weeks.
mt: Dobbiamo sbarcare dopo tre settimane.

src: Mr Bell was dismissive of the criticisms, commenting: ‘I have managed to succeed in campaigns without knowing the names of my opponents and I think I will be reasonably successful this time, too.’
mt: Bell hizo caso omiso de las críticas y comentó: “He logrado tener éxito en campañas sin saber los nombres de mis oponentes y creo que esta vez también tendré un éxito razonable”.

src: One mustn't succumb to pessimism, and it's pointless to look too far ahead, but in a couple of years she won't even be legal.
mt: Non bisogna cadere nel pessimismo, e non ha senso guardare troppo avanti, ma tra un paio d'anni non sarà nemmeno legale.

src: If you could contact Basil, then we can get the ball rolling.
mt: Se riesci a contattare Basil, possiamo metterci in moto.

src: Pandora, the first woman of Greek myth — as described by Hesiod — is created from earth; at Zeus's command she was fashioned from clay to be the instrument of divine retribution.
mt: Pandora, la prima donna del mito greco - come descritto da Esiodo - è stata creata dalla terra; per ordine di Zeus è stata modellata con l'argilla per essere lo strumento della divina punizione.

src: This is also partly the reason why in Adorno's theory music in a sense assumes too much autonomy, so much as to create a danger of a relapse into idealism.
mt: Questo è anche in parte il motivo per cui nella teoria di Adorno la musica in un certo senso assume troppa autonomia, tanto da creare il pericolo di una ricaduta nell'idealismo.

src: I thought so, I mean it was getting late.
mt: Lo pensé, quiero decir, ya era tarde.

src: I haven't got time to plan it, I'd better start it.
mt: No tengo tiempo para planificar, mejor comienzo.

src: He declared on television that "Poland's painful but necessary programme of recovering from economic catastrophe can only be realized with the understanding of the majority of the nation" and that "the country had made its choice".
mt: Declaró en televisión que «el programa doloroso pero necesario de recuperación de Polonia de la catástrofe económica solo puede realizarse con el entendimiento de la mayoría de la nación» y que «el país había hecho su elección».
